title: Horror messages
description: Every 10-15 minutes, a random horror message will be sent to the chat. Perfect if you are looking for a psychological horror mod!
body:
Need a server? Click [HERE](https://bisecthosting.com/kamussy) to get one 25% off!

---

If you have any complaints, comments, or suggestions, please join the [discord server](https://discord.gg/fYrff3FXG3)

--- 

Every 10-15 minutes, a random horror message from the list below will be sent to the chat for all players to see. 

---



Message list:

Help me

Hello?

Can you hear me??

I can see you

Behind you

It is controlling me.

Don't go over there.

01001100 01000101 01000001 01010110 01000101 (translates to LEAVE)

<username> Help

<username> I'm not me

<username> obfuscated text
